title: calycothrix decandra
intro: Calycothrix decandra, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical regions of Asia. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calycothrix decandra include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cognitive function, and supporting immune system health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
